violations.description: Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Observed single service containers on floor in storage area.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Observed pitcher in hand sink.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Observed floor by fryer and adjacent counter needs to be cleaned.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
